rag_rules: Use annex agree blocks only for component type or implementation contracts
Place signal flow descriptions in implementation annexes using assign statements
Use exact model names for ports and subcomponents in AGREE expressions
Do not use AADL properties directly in AGREE expressions
generic_rules: Use assign statements for implementation-level bindings
Place assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes
Use visible identifiers from the model index
Avoid inventing identifiers or copying from examples
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `assign output = expression;` for signal flow descriptions
Use exact model names for ports and subcomponents
anti_patterns: Do not use AADL properties directly in AGREE expressions
Do not place guarantees in implementation annexes
Do not invent identifiers or copy from examples
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in type annexes
